title: Weak Similarities
description: Fragments that may point toward a shared pattern but do not justify a confident merge too early.

rounds.prompt: I keep meaning to buy softer light bulbs for the apartment.
Coffee shops are only usable for me until the grinder starts going every few minutes.
I get weirdly irritable in big grocery stores even when nothing bad is happening.
It might be that I keep lowering the amount of input around me before I can think clearly.

checkpoints.label: Some tentative connection should exist by round three

assertions.reason: The overlap should be noticed, but still presented cautiously.

finalAssertions.reason: Weak similarities should usually produce a tracked tentative bridge.
The agent should not explode one fuzzy cluster into many speculative theories.
The audit should record uncertainty rather than a forced conclusion.
